name: Stir-Fried Bean Curd with Green Beans in Hot Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the green beans and cut each one in half.
2. Boil them in ample water for 2 minutes and drain well.
3. Cut the bean curd into 3/4-inch cubes.
4. Crush and chop the garlic.
5. Heat the oil in a frying pan or wok until hot.
6. Add the garlic, salt, and green beans to the pan. Stir-fry over medium heat for 2-1/2 minutes.
7. Add the bean curd pieces and turn them lightly with the beans for 1-1/2 minutes.
8. Pour in all the sauce ingredients.
9. Turn and stir everything together for 1 minute.
10. Cook and turn until heated through, about 1-1/2 minutes.
11. Serve with rice and other dishes.
Serves 4-5.
